name: todays-goals
description: Morning ritual skill that combines an external briefing with structured goal-setting. Runs in five phases — calendar, email, open planner items, deliverables, then open drill-down. Use when the user wants to set goals for the day, do their morning planning session, or write their daily goals.
instructions:
See skills/todays-goals/SKILL.md for full instructions.

Summary: Run a structured session in five phases. Phase 1 — use the Google Calendar MCP tool to surface today's events as candidate goals. Phase 2 — use the Gmail MCP tool (query built from ~/.notes-context/email-filter.md blocklist) to surface emails that are from Stakeholders or imply action; skip automated noise. Phase 3 — read ~/.notes-context/user-planner.md and surface open items that are actionable today. Phase 4 — surface Now-horizon non-blocked Deliverables from the active project's roadmap.md. Phase 5 — open drill-down: 'Anything else?'. For each confirmed item, ask follow-up questions to sharpen into - [ ] subtasks, then write ## heading + subtasks to ~/.notes-context/daily-goals.md. Append if file already has content; never duplicate a heading. roadmap.md is never modified by this skill.
